title: dasystephana grayi
intro: Dasystephana grayi, also known as the Gray's Dasystephana or D. grayi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Dasystephana grayi include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which provide various health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Dasystephana grayi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a dietary supplement to boost overall health and well-being.
